name: watch-deploys
description: Local, read-only deploy + pipeline watcher with a live dashboard and quiet, edge-triggered desktop/phone notifications. Picks up where a merge ends: did the pipeline go green, what is deployed to which environment, is prod behind. Provider-agnostic (GitHub, Azure DevOps) via a small adapter seam. Zero runtime dependencies — pure Node stdlib plus your host's CLI (gh / az).
author: Micke Berg (https://mickeberg.com)
